factors.summary: Demand is accelerating.

evidence.text: Orders of $1,212 million, up 31.3% from $923 million in the prior year, up 8.1% on an organic basis

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: The evidence shows a significant year-over-year increase in orders, indicating strong demand acceleration.

factors.summary: Order backlog is growing.

evidence.text: Orders of $1,212 million, up 31.3% from $923 million in the prior year, up 8.1% on an organic basis

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: The growing order backlog, evidenced by a 31.3% year-over-year increase, suggests strong future revenue potential.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is low-single-digits.

evidence.text: We anticipate total revenue growth in the range of 24% to 25% in 2017 with organic revenue growth in the low-single-digits and the Sensus and Visenti acquisitions contributing the additional revenue growth

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Low-single-digit organic growth, while modest, indicates moderate improvement in revenue performance.

factors.summary: End markets are growing, particularly in industrial, public utility, commercial, and residential segments.

evidence.text: •Industrial market revenue was up slightly on an organic basis through the first half of the year... •Public utility revenue declined 4% organically through the first half of the year... •In the commercial markets, growth was 3% through the first half of the year... •In residential markets, growth was 14% for the first half of the year...

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Mixed growth across end markets, with some segments growing and others declining, results in a neutral sentiment.

factors.summary: Labor costs are manageable with restructuring savings.

evidence.text: The increase in operating margin was due to several contributing factors with cost reductions resulting from progress in our productivity and global procurement initiatives and restructuring savings being amongst the largest.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Cost management through restructuring and productivity initiatives shows effective control, contributing positively to margins.

factors.summary: Gross and operating margins are improving.

evidence.text: Operating margin was 11.9% for 2017 versus 11.7% for 2016, an increase of 20 basis points. Adjusted operating margin was 13.3% in 2017 as compared to 13.0% in 2016.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Improving margins, though modest, indicate positive developments in cost management and efficiency.

factors.summary: Cost actions are delivering measurable savings.

evidence.text: During 2017, we expect to incur approximately $40 million in Sensus integration, restructuring and realignment costs. We expect to realize approximately $20 million of incremental net savings in 2017 from actions initiated in 2016, and an additional $5 million of net savings from our 2017 actions.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Measurable savings from cost actions demonstrate effective cost management strategies.

factors.summary: Productivity is improving through restructuring and efficiency initiatives.

evidence.text: These favorable impacts on operating margin were largely offset by cost inflation and the impact of Sensus acquisition related costs and Sensus purchase accounting impacts.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Improving productivity through restructuring and efficiency initiatives supports positive margin developments.

factors.summary: Management has provided forward guidance with expected revenue growth of 24-25% and low-single-digit organic growth.

evidence.text: We anticipate total revenue growth in the range of 24% to 25% in 2017 with organic revenue growth in the low-single-digits and the Sensus and Visenti acquisitions contributing the additional revenue growth.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Management's forward guidance indicates strong revenue growth, which is a clear positive signal.

factors.summary: Management is confident with strategic actions and integration of Sensus.

evidence.text: We will continue to strategically execute restructuring and realignment actions... Additionally, with the acquisition of Sensus, we anticipate increased spending on research and development as a percentage of revenue as Sensus brings a higher profile of R&D given the investment required to support growth and new product launches.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Management expresses confidence in strategic actions and integration, indicating a positive outlook.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include economic and geopolitical factors.

evidence.text: Factors that could cause results to differ materially from those anticipated include: overall economic and business conditions, political and other risks associated with our international operations, including military actions, economic sanctions or trade embargoes that could affect customer markets, and non-compliance with laws, including foreign corrupt practice laws, export and import laws and competition laws.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Near-term risks include economic and geopolitical factors, which could pose challenges.

factors.summary: Long-term strategic direction is clear with investments in Sensus and R&D.

evidence.text: Additionally, with the acquisition of Sensus, we anticipate increased spending on research and development as a percentage of revenue as Sensus brings a higher profile of R&D given the investment required to support growth and new product launches.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Clear long-term strategic investments in R&D and Sensus indicate positive developments.

factors.summary: Key sensitivities include foreign exchange movements and economic conditions.

evidence.text: constant currency basis mostly due to $238 million of revenue related to the Sensus business acquisition and organic revenue growth of $10 million... Factors that could cause results to differ materially from those anticipated include: overall economic and business conditions...

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Key sensitivities include foreign exchange and economic conditions, which are risks but not clearly negative.

factors.summary: Catalysts include new product launches and integration benefits from Sensus.

evidence.text: Additionally, with the acquisition of Sensus, we anticipate increased spending on research and development as a percentage of revenue as Sensus brings a higher profile of R&D given the investment required to support growth and new product launches.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: New product launches and integration benefits from Sensus are positive catalysts for growth.

factors.summary: Differentiation is maintained through technology and customer relationships.

evidence.text: Xylem is a leading global water technology company. We design, manufacture and service highly engineered solutions ranging across a wide variety of critical applications.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Differentiation through technology and customer relationships is a strong positive indicator.

factors.summary: R&D investment is increasing with the acquisition of Sensus.

evidence.text: Additionally, with the acquisition of Sensus, we anticipate increased spending on research and development as a percentage of revenue as Sensus brings a higher profile of R&D given the investment required to support growth and new product launches.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Increased R&D investment due to Sensus acquisition is a clear positive signal for future growth.

factors.summary: Free cash flow is improving.

evidence.text: Cash flow from operating activities of $151 million for the six months ended June 30, 2017, up 20.8% from the prior year, and free cash flow, excluding Sensus acquisition related costs, of $96 million as compared to $63 million in the prior year.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Free cash flow has shown a significant improvement with a 20.8% increase and a notable jump in absolute terms.

factors.summary: M&A activity is creating value through the Sensus acquisition.

evidence.text: Additionally, with the acquisition of Sensus, we anticipate increased spending on research and development as a percentage of revenue as Sensus brings a higher profile of R&D given the investment required to support growth and new product launches.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: M&A activity is creating value through the Sensus acquisition, which is expected to contribute to future growth.

factors.summary: Economic conditions are a tailwind with expected revenue growth.

evidence.text: We anticipate total revenue growth in the range of 24% to 25% in 2017 with organic revenue growth in the low-single-digits and the Sensus and Visenti acquisitions contributing the additional revenue growth.

sentiment.label: very_positive
sentiment.rationale: Economic conditions are acting as a tailwind with strong expected revenue growth of 24-25%. This indicates a very positive outlook.

factors.summary: Foreign exchange exposure is a sensitivity.

evidence.text: constant currency basis mostly due to $238 million of revenue related to the Sensus business acquisition and organic revenue growth of $10 million... Factors that could cause results to differ materially from those anticipated include: overall economic and business conditions, political and other risks associated with our international operations...

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Foreign exchange exposure is identified as a sensitivity, particularly due to the Sensus acquisition, which introduces potential risks.

factors.summary: Geopolitical risks are identified as potential headwinds.

evidence.text: Factors that could cause results to differ materially from those anticipated include: overall economic and business conditions, political and other risks associated with our international operations, including military actions, economic sanctions or trade embargoes that could affect customer markets, and non-compliance with laws, including foreign corrupt practice laws, export and import laws and competition laws.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Geopolitical risks, including military actions and economic sanctions, are identified as potential headwinds that could impact international operations.
